narration: Science has a clearer story about Nyquist sampling than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about Nyquist sampling than social media does.

narration: Nyquist sampling helps us understand how to capture sound and images accurately.
visual_description: Context visual: Nyquist sampling helps us understand how to capture sound and images accurately.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Nyquist sampling helps us understand how to capture sound and images accurately.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Nyquist sampling helps us understand how to capture sound and images accurately.

narration: If you don't sample often enough, your data gets distorted—ever heard of aliasing?
visual_description: Escalation visual: If you don't sample often enough, your data gets distorted—ever heard of aliasing?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: If you don't sample often enough, your data gets distorted—ever heard of aliasing?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: If you don't sample often enough, your data gets distorted—ever heard of aliasing?

narration: The Nyquist theorem states you need to sample at least twice the highest frequency.
visual_description: Evidence visual: The Nyquist theorem states you need to sample at least twice the highest frequency.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: The Nyquist theorem states you need to sample at least twice the highest frequency.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: The Nyquist theorem states you need to sample at least twice the highest frequency.

narration: So, proper sampling prevents loss of information and keeps our audio and visuals sharp.
visual_description: Payoff visual: So, proper sampling prevents loss of information and keeps our audio and visuals sharp.
